pr.title: Record: Fused MLP (Triton+CUTLASS EVT) + MLP 3.5× + Mixed int5/int6 + SLOT + Brotli — 1.1088 BPB (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Fused MLP kernels, a 3.5× MLP, and Hessian-guided mixed int5/int6 quantization reclaim throughput while fitting 16MB with Brotli.
techniques: Fused Triton TMA forward + CUTLASS EVT backward MLP kernels with precomputed act_grad
Wider 3.5× MLP with Hessian-trace mixed int5/int6 quantization
Brotli-11 compression plus memmap multi-shard prefetch pipeline
